config.headline: One Roti Can Change a Life
config.subheading: Join Ek Roti Foundation in feeding hungry people and supporting needy families across India.
config.address: Plot No-28, Hare Krishna Villa, Near Sky-9, Godadra Moje, Dindoli, Surat, Gujarat 394210, India

donationTiers.description: Feeds 5 hungry persons a full warm nutritional meal.
Feeds 10 persons. Most popular choice among family donors.
Feeds 25 persons. Excellent support for poor neighborhood clusters.

reviews.name: Rajesh Sharma
reviews.text: Ek Roti Foundation is doing excellent work for needy people. I am proud to support them. Their transparency is incredibly reassuring.

reviews.name: Sunita Verma
reviews.text: Serving raw food is one thing, but serving hot, fresh, hygienic rotis directly to poor children is truly commendable.

reviews.name: Amit Patel
reviews.text: We sponsored a complete food camp in Dindoli area. The execution, distribution discipline, and pure joy of the elderly beneficiaries were heart-warming.

reviews.name: Pooja Singh
reviews.text: Excellent and dedicated ground team! Joining them as a food server completely modified my outlook on life.

reviews.name: Mohan Yadav
reviews.text: I regularly see their customized vans in Godadra area. Every single plate is distributed with utmost respect and humility.

reviews.name: Neha Gupta
reviews.text: A highly trusted NGO in Surat. Even small contributions making an emotional impact.

reviews.name: Suresh Kumar
reviews.text: They helped thousands of migrants and underprivileged families during difficult rains. Purely self-less service.

reviews.name: Kavita Joshi
reviews.text: This foundation gives us the platform to give back to Indian society. Feeding poor families is highly spiritual.

stories.title: Surat Flood Relief Feeding
stories.description: During the devastating Surat seasonal floods, Ek Roti Foundation mobilized instantly, preparing and distributing warm rice, rotis, and pure water packets to more than 1,000 helpless citizens trapped near the Tapi river bank.

stories.title: Migrant Highway Support Drives
stories.description: Distributed emergency high-energy dry ration kits, water bottle crates, and freshly baked rotis to home-bound migrant workers travelling on foot and by trucks during extreme summer waves.

stories.title: Elderly Rains Survival Cover
stories.description: Provided fresh meals, heavy rain jackets, and emergency medical kits to underprivileged senior citizens living in hazardous thatch roofs during heavy Gujarat monsoon downpours.

stories.title: Slum Children Nutritional Camp
stories.description: Organized a weekend nourishment carnival with interactive games, pure quality meals, fresh fruit distribution, and basic education supplies for municipal neighborhood children.

stories.title: Holi Festival Mega Food Camp
stories.description: Shared the pure spirits of the colors festival by cooking a large batch of special puri-sabji, sweets, and rotis for homeless street-dwellers and poor children around Surat.

stories.title: Dry Ration Kits to Widows & Families
stories.description: Distributed customized premium monthly dry grocer ration kits (including wheat flour, pulses, cooking oil, and salt) to underprivileged widows, ensuring long-term family survival.

stories.title: Festival Camp Event - Chapter 7
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Following sudden local flooding, our emergency kitchen sprang into action, mass-producing packed chapatis with pickle and pure water satchels for remote, mud-clogged peripheral settlements. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Elderly Support Event - Chapter 8
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Hyderabad, Telangana. Brought festive smiles and joy during Diwali by organizing community kitchen setups in backward blocks. Served premium grains, dry sweets, and pure ghee chapatis to make everyone feel remembered. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Children Wellness Event - Chapter 9
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Jaipur, Rajasthan. Set up our custom mobile kitchen at active low-income construction intersections to feed daily wage workers, rickshaw-pullers, and seasonal migrant laborers who skip meals to save minor coins. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Disaster Relief Event - Chapter 10
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. Launched a focused iron & protein rich meal distribution campaign for underprivileged pregnant women in fringe hamlets to ensure nutritional security for mothers and future babies. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Daily Feeding Event - Chapter 11
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Patna, Bihar. Our dedicated volunteers braved severe torrential downpours to distribute hot chapatis, dal, and fresh vegetables to families stranded in raw municipal shelters. Many had not eaten a warm meal in over 48 hours. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Festival Camp Event - Chapter 12
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Organized a wholesome nutrition camp providing fortified wheat chapatis, sweet kheer, and fruit bowls to impoverished children from local slums, boosting their energy and morale. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Elderly Support Event - Chapter 13
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Ranchi, Jharkhand. Identified and supported neglected senior citizens living alone in unhygienic shanties. Distributed fresh, soft high-nutrition food kits tailored to their medical needs, alongside basic medicines. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Daily Feeding Event - Chapter 86
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Bengaluru, Karnataka. Set up our custom mobile kitchen at active low-income construction intersections to feed daily wage workers, rickshaw-pullers, and seasonal migrant laborers who skip meals to save minor coins. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Festival Camp Event - Chapter 87
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Launched a focused iron & protein rich meal distribution campaign for underprivileged pregnant women in fringe hamlets to ensure nutritional security for mothers and future babies. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Elderly Support Event - Chapter 88
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Hyderabad, Telangana. Our dedicated volunteers braved severe torrential downpours to distribute hot chapatis, dal, and fresh vegetables to families stranded in raw municipal shelters. Many had not eaten a warm meal in over 48 hours. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Children Wellness Event - Chapter 89
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Jaipur, Rajasthan. Organized a wholesome nutrition camp providing fortified wheat chapatis, sweet kheer, and fruit bowls to impoverished children from local slums, boosting their energy and morale. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Disaster Relief Event - Chapter 90
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. Identified and supported neglected senior citizens living alone in unhygienic shanties. Distributed fresh, soft high-nutrition food kits tailored to their medical needs, alongside basic medicines. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

stories.title: Daily Feeding Event - Chapter 91
stories.description: Ek Roti Foundation organized a dedicated community service mission in Patna, Bihar. Following sudden local flooding, our emergency kitchen sprang into action, mass-producing packed chapatis with pickle and pure water satchels for remote, mud-clogged peripheral settlements. Every volunteer went above and beyond to spread happiness and relief.

volunteers.message: Excited to assist with the upcoming weekend community kitchen drive in Dindoli district.
I want to help organize digital fund drives and support on-ground kitchen management.

gallery.title: Smiles over Warm Plates
gallery.description: Young school children happily enjoying fresh, hygienic roti and vegetable thali distributed in Surat.

gallery.title: Respecting the Elders
gallery.description: An elderly mother receiving warm daily meals with deep gratitude during hard seasonal rains.

gallery.title: Our Dynamic Ground Kitchen
gallery.description: Volunteers preparing fresh, steaming hot batches of wheat chapatis at our clean central kitchen setup.

gallery.title: Community Distribution Drive
gallery.description: Mega relief food camp organized on the outskirts of Godadra to comfort seasonal migrant labors.

gallery.title: Volunteers: The Moving Spirits
gallery.description: The heartbeat of Ek Roti Foundation - happy young volunteers packing chapatis and grain kits.

events.title: Dindoli Slum Food Drive
events.location: Hare Krishna Villa Sector, Dindoli, Surat
events.description: Daily feeding drive targeting children, widows, and physically challenged individuals with nutrition packets.

events.title: Godadra Highway Migrant Support
events.description: Setting up hydration and dry grain food camp to feed daily commuters, helpers, and manual pushcart operators.

events.title: Surat Flood Pre-Relief Camp
events.description: Distributed pre-monsoon secure survival bags and dry grains items to riverbank settlements.
